title: Tasks: Client-Side Drive Upload Implementation Plan
response:
Feedback Summary (1 comments):

Specific Text Comments:
1. "- [ ] 2. Create Google Drive token endpoint for cl...": Should leverage current implementation of `TokenService` to get token from database. Refer to @backend/src/modules/auth/utils/token-db.util.ts .

comments.comment: Should leverage current implementation of `TokenService` to get token from database. Refer to @backend/src/modules/auth/utils/token-db.util.ts .
comments.selectedText:
- [ ] 2. Create Google Drive token endpoint for client-side uploads
  - Files: backend/src/modules/auth/controllers/auth.controller.ts, backend/src/modules/auth/services/google-drive-token.service.ts
  - Add GET /auth/drive-token endpoint that returns valid OAuth access tokens
  - Create GoogleDriveTokenService for Drive-specific token operations
  - Implement token validation and automatic refresh for Drive scope
  - Purpose: Provide secure Drive tokens for frontend direct uploads
  - _Leverage: Existing AuthService, TokenDBUtil, JWT guards, rate limiting decorators_
  - _Requirements: 2.0 - Drive Token Management Endpoint_
  - _Prompt: Implement the task for spec client-side-drive-upload, first run spec-workflow-guide to get the workflow guide then implement the task: Role: Backend API Developer specializing in OAuth token management and security | Task: Create Drive token endpoint and service following OAuth best practices, extending existing AuthService patterns for token refresh and validation with proper scope restrictions | Restrictions: Must use existing JWT authentication, maintain rate limiting, ensure tokens have minimal scope (drive.file only), do not expose refresh tokens to frontend | Success: Endpoint returns valid Drive access tokens, automatic refresh works, proper error handling for expired/invalid tokens | Instructions: First mark this task as in progress in tasks.md, then implement the Drive token endpoint and service, finally mark as complete when tokens can be successfully retrieved and used_
